APPROVE
Implementation cleanly threads a provider pin through the runner, discovery, and routing gate. The gate's "trust pi when provider is pinned" rationale is reasonable and well-scoped — the Gemini-only branch remains strict when no provider is given, and regression coverage is explicit.

Implementation cleanly threads a provider pin through the runner, discovery, and routing gate. The gate's "trust pi when provider is pinned" rationale is reasonable and well-scoped — the Gemini-only branch remains strict when no provider is given, and regression coverage is explicit.
